query: SELECT id, phone, customerName, invoiceNumber, amount, pointsEarned, status, customerId, claimedAt, expiresAt, createdAt FROM pending_rewards WHERE phone = '+96565068000' OR phone = 'whatsapp:+96565068000' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4xeK7FVQkXBtxe6.root --database 45yCshMdhCKkPUhGJzLrcU --execute SELECT id, phone, customerName, invoiceNumber, amount, pointsEarned, status, customerId, claimedAt, expiresAt, createdAt FROM pending_rewards WHERE phone = '+96565068000' OR phone = 'whatsapp:+96565068000' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5
